package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_string_handling_regexp_compile_in_request_path: Layer: String handling. Flag regexp.Compile or MustCompile inside handlers, loops, or repeated functions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario596Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
